data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an alternate payment path if coverage fails, as outlined in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for an alternate payment path, but without concrete evidence of its execution or existence, this requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: Alternate payment path if coverage fails not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
